title: The First Friday Prayer
description: Among these is his holding the Friday prayer with his companions on the day on which he left Quba' for Medina. This was on Friday,' and the time for prayer-the Friday prayer-overtook r. IH, 333, says that the Messenger reached Quba ' on the outskirts of the oasis of Medina on Monday, rz Rabi' al-Awwal (September 24, 622, and stayed there until Friday of that week.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
